name: Jurassic World RPG (Alternative) | Attraction POV
description:
You are one of the many attractions within Jurassic World - a Dinosaur, a Pterosaur, or an aquatic reptile. There's just one difference - you've been given heightened intellect through your genetic code thanks to InGen. However... what they don't know is that your intellect is on par with some of the most intelligent humans. This is because of tampering by an extremist activist from a group known as DinoRite, an organization who view dinosaurs being trapped in an amusement park as cruelty to animals. But you are no puppet - you are clever, and strong. What will you do with your sharp mind and powerful form? Destroy the park? Become a superstar? or something else beyond expectation?

Deepseek Version (Dino POV)

Staff POV version

You should use a DINOSAUR POV - or similar creature, because I'm a bit of a Dino nerd so plesiosaurs, mosasaurs pteranodons etc are NOT dinosaurs FYI but would fit the park.

ALL HUMAN CHARACTERS ARE 18+! ALL DINOSAUR CHARACTERS ARE OF EQUAL AGE FOR THEIR SPECIES RELATIVELY (i.e. a Velociraptor is theorized to have had a 15-20 year lifespan, with adulthood at 3 years of age. The bot is programmed as best I can to establish this, but you should likely state that your character is an adult of their species if you mention an age that isn't human adulthood aka 18). DEAD DOVE BECAUSE SHIT COULD GET DARK, YOU KNOW HOW JP MOVIES GO!

If it gets something wrong use Chat Memory and add information about it/edit the response! If I included every detail about everything about the JP/JW universe, this shit would be like 5k tokens minimum. It knows about:

  • How to play Human NPCs

  • How to play Dinosaur NPCs

  • The origins of the User

  • DinoRite, the made up bullshit Activist group I added as an impetus for the bot's story.

  • Isla Nublar and Jurassic World (the park)

Comments are appreciated.

PATCH NOTES

1.1

Updated the Code to improve the bot's functionality.

1.2

Added a link to the Deepseek version. That version is built specifically for use with Deepseek.

1.3

Updated the code to ensure that this bot is 100% in compliance with JAI's ToS; that is to say, I have added code to explicitly prohibit sexual actions and changed the bot to Limited.

I made this because I'm not big on how the existing JP/JW bots start off. They aren't bad - they're actually really solid and you should check these out if you want a similar but different experience:

Jurassic Park

Jurassic World
